selected_title: Study on Absorptive Capacity for Enterprises to Obtain Customer Knowledge Oriented CRM
question: How does the evidence in “Study on Absorptive Capacity for Enterprises to Obtain Customer Knowledge Oriented CRM” constrain claims about transfer from individual to organizational learning?

evidence_spans.text: This paper studies the absorptive capacity for enterprises to aquire customer-related knowledge and introduces a conceptual framework of customer-related knowledge absorptive capacity.It also studies the four aspects of absorptive capacity:aquiring,assimilating,transforming and exploiting customer-related knowledge.The research shows that if enterprises possess the capacity of aquiring,assimilating,transforming and exploiting customer-related knowledge they will abtain both customer value and enterprise profit.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Absorptive capacity, Customer knowledge through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 57 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
